title: taraxacum ochrocarpum
intro: Taraxacum ochrocarpum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum ochrocarpum include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum ochrocarpum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum ochrocarpum can be consumed as a herbal tea, coffee, or wine, and its roots and leaves can be used in salads, soups, or as a garnish, while its flowers can be used as a garnish or in herbal infusions.
